description: Egeria REST API outer request body catalog. Derived from egeria-platform-6.1 http-client-collections.

create_entity.label: Create Entity
create_entity.description: Create a new metadata entity. The 'properties' field holds the type-specific Layer 2 body.

create_from_template.label: Create from Template
create_from_template.description: Instantiate a new element by copying a template and substituting placeholder values.

update_entity.label: Update Entity
update_entity.description: Update properties on an existing entity. 'mergeUpdate: true' performs a partial update; false replaces all properties.

delete_entity.label: Delete Entity
delete_entity.description: Delete a metadata entity. 'cascadeDelete' removes anchored child elements.

relationship.label: Relationship
relationship.description: Create or update a relationship between two elements.

classification.label: Classification
classification.description: Add, update, or remove a classification on an element.

search.label: Search / Query
search.description: Find metadata elements by string, structured properties, or name. All include pagination and status-filter options.

external_id.label: External Identifiers
external_id.description: Attach or manage external system identifiers on Egeria elements.

governance_action.label: Governance Actions
governance_action.description: Initiate or manage governance engine actions and processes.

scalar.label: Simple / Scalar
scalar.description: Thin wrappers carrying a single value — used for targeted operations.

admin.label: Admin / System
admin.description: Platform administration, security configuration, and user management.

fields.class: Discriminator — always the body type name (set automatically).
fields.initialClassifications: Map of classification name → classification properties to apply at creation time.
fields.properties: Layer 2 body: the type-specific properties object. Set 'class' to the Properties type name.

example.assignToActorGUID: add guid of actor that will be assigned this action (AssignmentScope relationship)

fields.class: Discriminator — always the body type name (set automatically).
fields.effectiveTime: Point-in-time for the operation (defaults to now if omitted).
fields.forDuplicateProcessing: true = suppress duplicate-detection during this operation.
fields.forLineage: true = include elements with the Memento classification (archived for lineage).
fields.limitResultsByStatus: Only return elements with these statuses (e.g. ['ACTIVE']).
fields.pageSize: Maximum number of results per page.
fields.sequencingOrder: Sort order: PROPERTY_ASCENDING, PROPERTY_DESCENDING, CREATION_DATE_RECENT, etc.
